headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Revvity, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Evie Koslosky   maintains Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $110 to $95.

raw.headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Revvity, Lowers Price Target to $95

headline: Barclays Downgrades Revvity to Equal-Weight, Lowers Price Target to $95
summary: Barclays  analyst Luke Sergott   downgrades Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $118 to $95.
